issues.title: Enemy dealt 15 damage (58% of 26 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: At turn seq 109, floor 1 encounter 2, enemy dealt 15 damage when player had 26 HP. This is 58% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 15 damage (58% of player's 26 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1 (early death)
issues.description: beginner profile was defeated on floor 1 with 54.54545454545454% accuracy. Final encounter against ember_drake (mini_boss), dealt 28 but took 64 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce floor 1 enemy damage or HP significantly; new players should rarely die on floor 1
